# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements: Smarter help, faster guidance
- Summary: Showcase the upgraded Azure OpenAI-powered assistant in CodeGrind with multi-model support, improved chat UX, and real-time problem-solving guidance.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-06-codegrind-ai-assistant-enhancements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now features an enhanced AI assistant powered by Azure OpenAI with multi-model support, delivering smarter, context-aware help directly in the practice editor. Users get guided problem-solving, code suggestions, and seamless switching between models for faster learning.
- CTA: Try the new AI assistant in your next practice session and share your experience with #CodeGrindAI
- Visual brief: A short demo video showing a user asking for hints, the AI assistant proposing a plan, code snippets appearing in the editor, and a quick toggle between AI models. Include UI elements: code editor, chat pane, model switcher, and a subtle CodeGrind brand presence.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
